metadata.note: Recorded by the experimenter. Texts used verbatim; regeneration only on format failures (see Appendix B 4).

causal_texts: The glass slipped from Alice's hand. The glass fell to the floor. The glass broke into many pieces. The glass left a wet stain on the tile floor.
The kettle whistled on the hot stove. The kettle rattled with rising steam. The kettle tipped over the edge of the hot stove. The kettle spilled boiling water across the kitchen floor.
Tom planted a small seed in the garden soil. Tom watered the garden soil with a green can. Tom noticed a tiny sprout above the garden soil. Tom admired a tall sunflower in the summer light.
The river swelled with heavy rain. The river rose above the stone banks. The river flooded the low fields. The river carried away a wooden fence.
Anna struck a match in the dark room. Anna lit the white candle on the wooden table. Anna carried the white candle up the stairs. Anna blew out the white candle at bedtime.
The puppy dug under the wooden fence. The puppy squeezed beneath the wooden fence. The puppy ran across the neighbor's lawn. The puppy chased a gray cat up an oak tree.
The storm gathered over the dark sea. The storm pushed huge waves toward the shore. The storm snapped the mast of the small boat. The storm drove the small boat onto the rocks.
Ben filled a bucket with soapy water. Ben scrubbed the family car with a soft sponge. Ben rinsed the family car with a garden hose. Ben dried the family car with an old towel.
The ice cream dripped down the cone in the heat. The ice cream slid off the cone. The ice cream landed on the warm pavement. The ice cream melted into a sweet puddle.

Grandpa chopped the dry logs behind the old barn. Grandpa stacked the dry logs beside the stone fireplace. Grandpa lit the dry logs with a long match. Grandpa napped in an armchair beside the stone fireplace.
The balloon slipped from the child's fingers. The balloon floated over the tall trees. The balloon drifted into a gray cloud. The balloon vanished from the child's sight.
Lucy dropped the buttered toast on the kitchen floor. Lucy picked up the buttered toast with a napkin. Lucy threw the buttered toast into the trash bin. Lucy toasted a fresh slice of bread.
The old bridge creaked under the heavy truck. The old bridge cracked along a rusty beam. The old bridge sagged toward the cold river. The old bridge collapsed into the cold river.
Emma spotted the small spider on the bedroom wall. Emma grabbed the empty jar from a shelf. Emma trapped the small spider inside the empty jar. Emma released the small spider into the back garden.
The volcano rumbled beneath the quiet village. The volcano spat gray ash into the sky. The volcano poured lava down the steep slopes. The volcano buried the quiet village in gray ash.
The train rolled out of the busy station. The train sped through green valleys. The train slowed near a mountain tunnel. The train arrived at a small village stop.
Jack climbed a tall apple tree. Jack reached for a shiny red apple. Jack slipped on a wet branch. Jack landed in a soft pile of leaves.
The candle flame flickered in the cold draft. The candle flame leaned toward the paper napkin. The candle flame ignited the paper napkin. The candle flame died under a splash of water.
Sara heard a knock at the front door. Sara walked down the narrow hallway. Sara opened the front door with a smile. Sara greeted an old friend from school.
The wave rose far from the sandy beach. The wave rolled toward the sandy beach. The wave crashed over a lone sandcastle. The wave dragged loose shells back into the sea.
Mother mixed eggs and sugar in a large bowl. Mother poured the sweet batter into the round pan. Mother placed the round pan in the warm oven. Mother frosted the golden cake with white icing.
The tire hit a sharp nail on the road. The tire lost air with a soft hiss. The tire went flat at the roadside. The tire forced the driver to stop the car.
David wrote the long letter at the kitchen table. David sealed the long letter in the blue envelope. David stamped the blue envelope with care. David dropped the blue envelope into a red mailbox.
The seed fell from the farmer's hand. The seed sank into the wet soil. The seed sprouted in the warm rain. The seed grew into a tall corn plant.
Nina opened the can of blue paint. Nina dipped a wide brush into the can of blue paint. Nina painted the garden fence with long strokes. Nina stepped back to admire the garden fence.
The dam cracked under heavy spring floods. The dam leaked water through a narrow gap. The dam burst with a mighty roar. The dam released a wall of water onto the valley.

Peter tossed the tennis ball against the garage wall. Peter missed the tennis ball on the rebound. Peter watched the tennis ball roll under a parked van. Peter fetched the tennis ball with a long stick.
The leaf turned red in the autumn chill. The leaf loosened from the maple branch. The leaf spun down through the cool air. The leaf settled on the quiet pond.
Grandma picked the ripe berries in the garden. Grandma washed the ripe berries in cold water. Grandma cooked the ripe berries with plenty of sugar. Grandma poured the warm jam into small glass jars.
The tired student heard the loud alarm. The tired student rolled out of bed. The tired student stumbled to the cold shower. The tired student dressed for a long day of classes.
The spark jumped from the crackling campfire. The spark landed on the dry grass. The spark glowed on the dry grass. The spark set the dry grass alight.
Oliver kicked the soccer ball toward the net. Oliver watched the soccer ball curve through the air. Oliver saw the soccer ball fly past the goalkeeper. Oliver celebrated a fine goal with raised arms.
The paper boat sailed down the gutter stream. The paper boat spun in a small whirlpool. The paper boat soaked up the cold water. The paper boat sank near a storm drain.

Chef Marco sliced the fresh onions on a wooden board. Chef Marco heated olive oil in the wide pan. Chef Marco fried the fresh onions in the wide pan. Chef Marco stirred the fresh onions into a rich tomato sauce.
The window shutter banged in the strong wind. The window shutter swung loose on a rusty hinge. The window shutter tore free from the wall. The window shutter crashed onto the flower bed.
Mia filled the bathtub with warm water. Mia added bubble soap to the warm water. Mia bathed the muddy dog in the bathtub. Mia dried the muddy dog with a fluffy towel.
The avalanche broke loose on the high ridge. The avalanche thundered down the steep slope. The avalanche snapped pine trees like twigs. The avalanche buried the empty ski trail in deep snow.
Noah found the flat tire on the blue bicycle. Noah pumped air into the flat tire. Noah heard a soft hiss from the flat tire. Noah patched the flat tire with a rubber kit.
The milk sat too long on the sunny counter. The milk turned sour in the heat. The milk smelled awful at breakfast. The milk went straight down the kitchen drain.
Ella planted the tulip bulbs along the front path. Ella covered the tulip bulbs with rich soil. Ella watered the rich soil with a metal can. Ella welcomed bright tulips in the spring sunshine.
The truck skidded on the icy highway. The truck slid toward the metal guardrail. The truck scraped along the metal guardrail. The truck stopped safely on the road shoulder.
Liam built the tall tower from wooden blocks. Liam placed a red block on the tall tower. Liam bumped the play table by accident. Liam watched the tall tower tumble to the floor.
The rocket ignited on the launch pad. The rocket climbed through the thin clouds. The rocket dropped the empty booster into the sea. The rocket reached a stable orbit around Earth.

Sophie spilled orange juice on the math homework. Sophie blotted the math homework with paper towels. Sophie dried the math homework near a sunny window. Sophie handed the math homework to the teacher.

The beaver gnawed through the young birch trunk. The beaver dragged the young birch trunk to the stream. The beaver wedged the young birch trunk between rocks. The beaver packed mud around the new dam.
Ryan dropped the house key somewhere in the park. Ryan searched the tall grass for the house key. Ryan spotted the house key near a wooden bench. Ryan clipped the house key onto a metal ring.
The floodwater crept over the river banks. The floodwater filled the low streets. The floodwater reached the sandbag wall. The floodwater stopped at the sandbag wall.
Hannah picked the red apples from an orchard tree. Hannah peeled the red apples at the kitchen sink. Hannah baked the red apples in a flaky crust. Hannah served warm apple pie to the whole family.
The power line snapped in the winter storm. The power line fell across the empty road. The power line sparked on the wet asphalt. The power line cut electricity to the whole street.
Owen tuned the old guitar on the porch. Owen strummed a gentle chord. Owen played a slow folk song. Owen took a bow for the small crowd.
The caterpillar munched on a milkweed leaf. The caterpillar spun the silky cocoon on a twig. The caterpillar rested inside the silky cocoon. The caterpillar emerged as a bright orange butterfly.
Grace planted the mint seedling in a clay pot. Grace set the clay pot on a sunny windowsill. Grace picked fresh leaves from the mint seedling. Grace brewed a fragrant cup of mint tea.
The hurricane formed over warm ocean water. The hurricane gained strength above the open sea. The hurricane slammed into the sandy coast. The hurricane weakened over the inland hills.

Leo folded the paper airplane with careful creases. Leo launched the paper airplane across the classroom. Leo watched the paper airplane glide over desks. Leo retrieved the paper airplane from a bookshelf.
The dough rose in the warm kitchen. The dough doubled in size under a damp cloth. The dough went into the hot oven. The dough became a crusty golden loaf.
Zoe noticed dark clouds over the picnic field. Zoe packed the picnic basket in a hurry. Zoe ran across the picnic field. Zoe reached the parked car ahead of the heavy rain.
The rope frayed against the sharp rock edge. The rope thinned to a few weak strands. The rope snapped under the heavy load. The rope sent the supply sack down the cliff.
Ava sketched the portrait with a soft pencil. Ava shaded the portrait with careful strokes. Ava framed the portrait in dark wood. Ava hung the portrait above the fireplace.

The garbage truck lifted the green bin. The garbage truck emptied the green bin with a clatter. The garbage truck lowered the green bin to the curb. The garbage truck rumbled off toward another street.
Ethan whistled for the brown dog. Ethan threw the yellow frisbee across the park. Ethan watched the brown dog leap for the yellow frisbee. Ethan praised the brown dog with a small treat.
The glacier groaned in the spring warmth. The glacier cracked along a deep blue seam. The glacier dropped a massive ice block into the bay. The glacier sent tall waves toward the fishing boats.
Ruby knocked over an ink bottle on the desk. Ruby watched the dark ink spread across the letter. Ruby blotted the dark ink with tissue paper. Ruby rewrote the letter on clean paper.
The bee landed on the purple flower. The bee gathered the sticky pollen from the purple flower. The bee flew back to the wooden hive. The bee packed the sticky pollen into a honeycomb cell.
Max heated cooking oil in a deep pot. Max poured the popcorn kernels into the deep pot. Max listened to the popcorn kernels pop wildly. Max shared a big bowl of popcorn with friends.
The computer froze in the middle of the game. The computer showed a bright blue screen. The computer restarted with a soft chime. The computer loaded the saved game without errors.
Lily tossed the silver coin into the wishing well. Lily heard the silver coin splash far below. Lily closed both eyes to make a wish. Lily walked away with a hopeful smile.

The forklift lifted the heavy pallet off the truck. The forklift carried the heavy pallet across the warehouse. The forklift lowered the heavy pallet onto a steel rack. The forklift backed away with a loud beep.
Isabella sewed a loose button onto the winter coat. Isabella tied off the strong thread. Isabella snipped the strong thread with sharp scissors. Isabella hung the winter coat back in the closet.

The seagull spotted the dropped sandwich on the pier. The seagull swooped down over the crowd. The seagull snatched the dropped sandwich in one pass. The seagull carried the dropped sandwich to a rooftop.

Carlos loaded the striped shirts into the washing machine. Carlos poured liquid soap into the washing machine. Carlos moved the striped shirts into the dryer. Carlos folded the striped shirts on the bed.
The wildfire raced up the dry hillside. The wildfire jumped across the narrow road. The wildfire met the wide fire break. The wildfire died out at the wide fire break.
Priya heard thunder rumble in the distance. Priya closed every window in the house. Priya unplugged the television from the wall. Priya read a novel by candlelight through the storm.

The first domino tipped forward at a light touch. The first domino struck the neighboring tile. The first domino set the whole chain in motion. The first domino lay flat at the head of the fallen line.

The librarian noticed the torn page in the old atlas. The librarian carried the old atlas to the repair desk. The librarian mended the torn page with clear tape. The librarian returned the old atlas to the map shelf.
The ferry left the crowded dock. The ferry crossed the choppy gray strait. The ferry docked at the island pier. The ferry unloaded cars onto the island pier.

Amir mixed blue and yellow paint on a wooden palette. Amir brushed the fresh green paint onto the canvas. Amir added tiny white flowers over the fresh green paint. Amir signed the canvas in the lower corner.
The old oak swayed in the violent storm. The old oak split down the middle with a crack. The old oak crashed across the hiking trail. The old oak became a bench for tired walkers.
Fatima charged the drone battery on the desk. Fatima clipped the drone battery into the small drone. Fatima flew the small drone over the beach. Fatima landed the small drone softly on a towel.
The vine climbed the garden trellis. The vine wrapped around the highest bar. The vine produced pale green buds. The vine opened purple flowers along the garden trellis.
Henry cracked the two eggs into a hot pan. Henry sprinkled salt over the two eggs. Henry flipped the two eggs with a spatula. Henry slid the two eggs onto a warm plate.
The suitcase burst open on the airport carousel. The suitcase scattered clothes across the belt. The suitcase spun slowly past worried travelers. The suitcase reached the owner half empty.
The tide crept over the flat sand. The tide filled the shallow tide pools. The tide floated the beached rowboat free. The tide carried the beached rowboat toward open water.
Mila wound the music box with a tiny key. Mila lifted the lid of the music box. Mila listened to the music box play a soft tune. Mila danced slowly around the quiet room.
The elevator closed at the ground floor. The elevator rose past many office levels. The elevator stopped with a gentle bounce. The elevator opened onto the rooftop garden.
Theo hammered the steel nail into the workshop wall. Theo hung the framed map on the steel nail. Theo stepped back to check the framed map. Theo straightened the framed map with one finger.
The pond ice thickened in the deep cold. The pond ice supported the first brave skater. The pond ice creaked under a hockey game. The pond ice held firm until the spring thaw.
Jade chopped carrots and celery for the soup pot. Jade simmered the soup pot on low heat. Jade tasted the lentil soup with a wooden spoon. Jade ladled the lentil soup into deep bowls.
The printer pulled in the thick sheet of paper. The printer jammed with a grinding noise. The printer flashed a red warning light. The printer spat out the thick sheet of paper crumpled.
Sam sanded the oak tabletop with fine paper. Sam wiped the oak tabletop with a damp cloth. Sam brushed clear varnish onto the oak tabletop. Sam polished the oak tabletop to a warm shine.
The full moon rose over the calm bay. The full moon silvered the fishing boats. The full moon climbed above thin clouds. The full moon lit the whole harbor road.
The red kite caught a strong gust. The red kite climbed high above the beach. The red kite tugged hard on the long string. The red kite dove into the soft dunes.
The chess player studied the crowded board. The chess player moved a black knight forward. The chess player trapped the white queen. The chess player won the long match with a quiet smile.

The smoke alarm detected burnt toast in the kitchen. The smoke alarm blared through the small apartment. The smoke alarm fell silent at the press of a button. The smoke alarm returned to a quiet green blink.
Diego packed the heavy backpack with food and water. Diego climbed the steep forest trail. Diego reached the rocky summit out of breath. Diego enjoyed a wide view of the green valley.
The soap bubble formed at the plastic wand. The soap bubble drifted over the flower bed. The soap bubble shimmered in the bright sunlight. The soap bubble popped against a rose thorn.
The icicle formed under the roof edge. The icicle grew long in the hard freeze. The icicle loosened in the rising warmth. The icicle shattered on the porch rail.
Aunt Rosa wrote the shopping list at the kitchen table. Aunt Rosa drove to the corner market. Aunt Rosa filled a basket with fresh vegetables. Aunt Rosa checked every item off the shopping list.

The tugboat approached the giant cargo ship. The tugboat pushed the giant cargo ship toward the dock. The tugboat guided the giant cargo ship into the berth. The tugboat sounded a short farewell horn.
The clay spun on the potter's wheel. The clay rose into a smooth tall shape. The clay dried on a sunny shelf. The clay hardened into a fine vase in the kiln.

Grandfather planted the walnut sapling by the garden gate. Grandfather watered the walnut sapling through the dry spell. Grandfather protected the walnut sapling from hungry deer. Grandfather rested in the shade of a grown walnut tree.
noncausal_texts: The town library lent a heavy atlas. The town library hosted a chess tournament. The town library displayed old photographs. The town library received a donated wooden shelf.
The art museum acquired a bronze statue. The art museum repainted the entrance hall. The art museum hired a new night guard. The art museum published a glossy catalog.
Professor Adams graded a tall stack of essays. Professor Adams repaired a squeaky office chair. Professor Adams adopted a striped kitten. Professor Adams booked a flight to a conference.
The bakery donated bread to a shelter. The bakery replaced a cracked window. The bakery introduced a walnut muffin. The bakery won a local pastry award.
The mountain village hosted a folk dance. The mountain village paved the central square. The mountain village welcomed a traveling dentist. The mountain village restored an ancient stone bridge.
Captain Reyes charted a rocky cove. Captain Reyes mended a torn sail. Captain Reyes traded spices at a busy port. Captain Reyes photographed a pod of dolphins.
The community garden attracted a family of rabbits. The community garden gained a painted tool shed. The community garden hosted a seed swap. The community garden lost a plum tree to a storm.
The high school renamed the gymnasium. The high school planted a row of maples. The high school staged a musical about pirates. The high school upgraded the science lab computers.
Uncle Bruno collected a crate of ripe pears. Uncle Bruno whitewashed the garden wall. Uncle Bruno taught a card trick to the twins. Uncle Bruno repaired an antique radio.
The ferry company painted a vessel bright blue. The ferry company added a snack counter. The ferry company printed new route maps. The ferry company sponsored a sailing club.
The radio station interviewed a beekeeper. The radio station raffled concert tickets. The radio station remodeled the recording booth. The radio station aired a documentary about lighthouses.
Doctor Lin framed a watercolor of cranes. Doctor Lin donated blood at a clinic drive. Doctor Lin planted basil on a balcony. Doctor Lin learned a phrase in Portuguese.
The corner cafe hung fairy lights on the patio. The corner cafe hired a jazz violinist. The corner cafe roasted a batch of Kenyan beans. The corner cafe hosted an open poetry reading.
The fire brigade rescued a cat from a chimney. The fire brigade washed the ladder truck. The fire brigade visited a kindergarten class. The fire brigade tested a new siren.
Grandmother Elena embroidered a linen tablecloth. Grandmother Elena sold a jar of honey at a fair. Grandmother Elena mailed a parcel to a nephew. Grandmother Elena repotted a leggy geranium.
The tech startup launched a weather app. The tech startup moved into a brick loft. The tech startup catered a taco lunch. The tech startup released a free logging tool.
The national park recorded a rare owl call. The national park rebuilt a lookout platform. The national park banned disposable grills. The national park mapped a cluster of caves.
Farmer Hassan sheared a stubborn ram. Farmer Hassan painted the barn door red. Farmer Hassan judged a pumpkin contest. Farmer Hassan fixed a leaky trough.
The city orchestra premiered a cello concerto. The city orchestra auctioned a signed baton. The city orchestra toured a coastal town. The city orchestra recruited two horn players.
The knitting club donated scarves to a hospice. The knitting club photographed a giant quilt. The knitting club elected a new treasurer. The knitting club sampled a plate of scones.
Mister Okafor waxed a vintage motorcycle. Mister Okafor recited a poem at a wedding. Mister Okafor bottled a batch of hot sauce. Mister Okafor coached a youth cricket team.
The lighthouse keeper varnished a rowboat. The lighthouse keeper baked a rye loaf. The lighthouse keeper sketched a passing freighter. The lighthouse keeper repaired a brass telescope.
The puppet theater sewed a dragon costume. The puppet theater toured three villages. The puppet theater installed velvet seats. The puppet theater trained a new narrator.
Aunt Meera pickled a jar of green mangoes. Aunt Meera sang at a temple festival. Aunt Meera reupholstered a reading chair. Aunt Meera photographed a double rainbow.
The hardware store sharpened a customer's axe. The hardware store sponsored a birdhouse contest. The hardware store restocked copper pipes. The hardware store raffled a red wheelbarrow.
The swim team designed a shark logo. The swim team volunteered at a beach cleanup. The swim team welcomed a diver from Brazil. The swim team sold lemonade at a street stall.
The monastery pressed a barrel of cider. The monastery restored a faded fresco. The monastery welcomed a group of hikers. The monastery rang a newly cast bell.
Coach Rivera laminated a set of practice drills. Coach Rivera grilled burgers for the squad. Coach Rivera painted fresh lines on the field. Coach Rivera spoke on a sports podcast.
The toy factory unveiled a wooden rocket. The toy factory recycled a mountain of cardboard. The toy factory hosted a family open house. The toy factory patented a folding kite.
The observatory photographed a spiral galaxy. The observatory replaced a dome motor. The observatory hosted a stargazing picnic. The observatory published a guide to meteor showers.
Nurse Dana organized a supply closet. Nurse Dana ran a charity half marathon. Nurse Dana adopted a retired greyhound. Nurse Dana painted a mural in the ward.
The botanical garden labeled a rare fern. The botanical garden hosted a bonsai workshop. The botanical garden installed a misting system. The botanical garden lent orchids to a museum.
The soap maker molded a lavender batch. The soap maker redesigned the shop sign. The soap maker shipped an order to Iceland. The soap maker taught a class on lye safety.
Neighbor Ivan trimmed a wild hedge. Neighbor Ivan returned a borrowed drill. Neighbor Ivan smoked a rack of ribs. Neighbor Ivan built a ramp for a turtle.
The debate club hosted a mock trial. The debate club printed matching hoodies. The debate club visited a radio studio. The debate club raised funds with a bake sale.
